subcodes.first_line: O twin offshoots of the sanctified Tree! Thy letters arrived, but a response was delayed due to a severe illness that rendered writing impossible
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو افنان شجره مقدسه مکاتیب شما رسید ولی جواب تاخیر افتاد زیرا کسالت مزاج
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @business; financial; property matters, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
